_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Cover Letter: States job applying for

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The specific position being sought is not mentioned.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The job title mentioned does not align with the applicant's qualifications.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The letter identifies the position and illustrates how the applicant's qualifications are suitable for it.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The letter clearly names the role and effectively demonstrates how the applicant's qualifications and prior experience are a strong match for it.

criteria.name: Cover Letter: Promotes self in letter - lists skills, achievements, volunteerism experiences, etc.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The letter contains no content highlighting the applicant's abilities or accomplishments.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The applicant details their skills and educational successes, but omits any volunteer work or professional experience.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The letter outlines the applicant's skills, academic accomplishments, and relevant volunteer or professional experience.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The letter showcases a variety of skills, academic successes, and several instances of volunteer or professional experience.

criteria.name: Cover Letter: States that the resume is included with the letter and asks for interview

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The letter neither indicates that a resume is attached nor requests an interview.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The letter mentions the inclusion of a resume but does not make a request for an interview.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The letter confirms the resume's attachment and explicitly requests an interview.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The letter notes the resume's inclusion, requests an interview, and offers an avenue for further inquiries.

criteria.name: Resume: Targets job on cover letter

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The resume does not specify a particular job.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The job identified in the resume does not correspond with the one mentioned in the cover letter.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The job specified in the resume is consistent with the one stated in the cover letter.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The resume's content effectively reinforces the applicant's suitability for the job identified in the cover letter.

criteria.name: Resume: Reader friendly categories can be found easily, white space utilized, professional fonts and font sizes

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The resume's layout makes it impossible to read.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The resume's visual presentation hinders readability.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The resume is easy to read and navigate.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The resume's design is highly professional and well-suited for the intended position.

criteria.name: Resume: Includes education, activities, awards/honors, and volunteerism/work experience information

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No information regarding education, activities, volunteer work, or experience is provided.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Only one or two of the required sections are present.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the required sections are included.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Four or more sections are included and effectively support the targeted job.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The resume exceeds two pages in length.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Information is presented in paragraph form rather than concise points.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Sections are clearly labeled, and the information within them is well-organized.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Each section contains clearly identified and organized information that strongly supports the targeted job.

criteria.name: Spelling & Grammar: Documents are free of spelling, punctuation, and grammatical errors

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The documents contain three or more errors.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The documents contain two errors.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: There are no spelling errors, and no more than one punctuation or grammatical error.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: There are no spelling or grammatical errors, and no more than one punctuation error.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The cover letter is longer than one page, or not addressed correctly; the resume is longer than two pages; a photograph, link, or QR code is included.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The cover letter is no more than one page and addressed correctly; the resume is no more than two pages and does not include a photograph, link, or QR code; all documents are submitted as PDF.

criteria.name: Job Readiness & Qualifications
criteria.description: The competitor selects a job that aligns with their current abilities or those they will soon possess; they demonstrate an understanding of the job's responsibilities and its relevance to their career aspirations.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No job is chosen, or the selected job bears no relation to the competitor's skills, experience, or professional interests.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A job is selected, but its alignment with the competitor's qualifications is weak; the competitor shows limited comprehension of job duties or career relevance.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The chosen job is suitable given the competitor's current or anticipated qualifications; the competitor displays a basic understanding of the role and its connection to their career objectives.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The job is carefully chosen and clearly matches the competitor's current or near-future qualifications; the competitor demonstrates a strong grasp of job responsibilities and explicitly links the role to their long-term career goals.

criteria.name: Interview Preparation & Research
criteria.description: The competitor provides evidence of having investigated the company or position and integrates this knowledge into their responses.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No proof of research is presented; responses are general and do not relate to the company or role.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Evidence of research is limited or superficial; responses show minimal connection to the company or position.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Research is evident; responses include pertinent details about the company or job and reflect a general understanding of the role.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Thorough research is clearly demonstrated; responses are customized to the company and position, revealing thoughtful insight and intentional readiness.

criteria.name: Response Quality & Critical Thinking
criteria.description: The competitor answers questions thoughtfully and comprehensively, showcasing problem-solving abilities, decision-making skills, and self-awareness.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Responses are irrelevant, incomplete, or lack any indication of critical thinking or self-awareness.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses are brief or vague, with limited explanation or introspection; minimal evidence of problem-solving or decision-making is present.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses are clear and mostly comprehensive, demonstrating basic problem-solving and self-awareness with suitable examples.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses are thoughtful, well-developed, and insightful; they consistently exhibit critical thinking, sound reasoning, and profound self-reflection.

criteria.name: Presentation of Strengths & Experiences
criteria.description: The competitor clearly articulates relevant skills, experiences, and accomplishments, providing specific examples when appropriate.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor fails to mention any pertinent skills, experiences, or achievements.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A few strengths or experiences are mentioned, but they lack clarity or specific examples; connections to the job are not evident.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor clearly describes relevant skills and experiences, including at least one specific example to support their qualifications for the position.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor articulates multiple strengths and accomplishments with strong, specific examples; each is clearly linked to the job and demonstrates how they add value.

criteria.name: Career Goals & Motivation
criteria.description: The competitor communicates their short-term and long-term career objectives and expresses enthusiasm for the position or industry.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor does not express any career goals or interest in the position or industry.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Career goals are unclear or only short-term; limited enthusiasm or connection to the industry is shown.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor clearly communicates both short-term and long-term goals with appropriate enthusiasm for the position or field.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor clearly articulates thoughtful short-term and long-term goals, showing genuine passion for the position and industry; they demonstrate a clear vision for the future and how the role aligns with it.

criteria.name: Demonstrates proper greeting, introduction, and closing

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor fails to use a proper greeting, introduction, or closing.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor's greeting, introduction, or closing was ineffective.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor uses a strong greeting, introduction, and closing.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor's self-introduction is creative, and they either request or provide a follow-up action in the conclusion.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor did not exhibit any of the specified skills.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor demonstrated one or two of the listed skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection).

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor demonstrated three of the listed skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection).

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor demonstrated all skills, thereby enhancing the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates proper verbal and nonverbal communication skills

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Both verbal and nonverbal communication skills are unsuitable.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Verbal and/or nonverbal communication skills are poor or distracting.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: All questions were answered clearly using correct grammar and appropriate body language.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Verbal communication skills are outstanding; nonverbal communication is natural.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: The execution of the event is in alignment with all specified guidelines.

levels.label: Not Follow Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) failed to adhere to the guidelines.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: No technology was used; no materials were brought to the interview; no materials were left behind after the presentation.
